title: PowerHeroes
description: An addonpack made as jar file adding new ores , weapon , superpower , and heroes from different comic or brand like DC , Marvel , invicible
body:
![mark1movie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17a6a946de7368825cd2f29f416e32d5d88c1fc5.png)
**_PowerHeroes – Addonpack for Palladium:_**
PowerHeroes is an addonpack for Palladium, introducing superpowers, character from different world like DC and Marvel or event character from movie.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bfda8ddbf3325b315a5bc68dc08af91b67504da.png)**_Feature:_**
- Dna related Power 
- Custom Suit
- New Form of Technology
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
**_How to Unlock DNA Powers:_**
Its very simple take a serynge extract your dna with it then try different combination or use JEI it work too.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
**_All the current Power are listed here:_**

<details>
<summary>Power by DNA</summary>
1. Giant
</details>

<details>
<summary>Suit</summary>
1. Comic Mark 1 Iron Man Suit
2. Comic Mark 2 Iron Man Suit
</details>
_________________________________________________________________________________________________

**_Bug Report / Suggestion:_**

Report issues or suggest features directly on our Discord server: [Discord](https://discord.gg/H4Q5nxHQcQ)
